name: Yii2 PHP & MariaDB (Final)
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y default-mysql-server libmariadb-dev && sudo docker-php-ext-install pdo_mysql && sudo docker-php-ext-enable pdo_mysql && sudo service mariadb start && echo 'Aguardando MariaDB...' && until sudo mariadb-admin ping >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && sudo mariadb -u root < ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/schema.sql && sudo mariadb -u root -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'pubman_app'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'pubmanapp'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON db_pubman.* TO 'pubman_app'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
